title: Nitric's Music Discs
description: Just a small Music Disc Mod with 10 Songs
body:
# <ins>**Nitric's Music Disc Mod!**</ins>

My First Mod! 

**In ver 1.0.0 icon is a placeholder**

A small Music Disc Mod I made (mainly for my small survival server), it contains 10 songs:

Never Gonna Give You Up - Rick Astley

Funkytown - Lipps Inc.

Crab Rave - Noisestorm

Another One Bites The Dust - Queen

Dont Stop Me Now - Queen

Analog Sunrise - Michael Wyckoff

Key Gen - Michael Wyckoff

Bone Theme - Michael Wyckoff

Beat It - Michael Jackson

Lava Chicken (For the memes :)  ) - Steve (Jack Black)


![All Music Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e57ecd64202e59a08ac80178f5982b7cc8dddd3.png)

Discs **NOT** in order in image



![BONELAB Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b82ab6fe0afbb764edfb75420e6f8765714aa1d.gif)
Yes it has BONELAB and BONEWORKS songs


## <ins>Crafting Recipes</ins>

### Never Gonna Give You Up


![Crafting Recipe 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8623f12b4694df8375ac3906eef836a57e38c30b.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** first disc added in development and i just wanted a base recipe for all upcomming discs

### Funkytown


![Crafting Recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4588e3a8030ac58c3996ff06dfeafb24656ba34.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** redstone lights for funky party lights 
### Crab Rave


![Crafting Recipe 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b9b9e73d6ded2251b1653fe8a1a159a64977109.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** turtle scute closest thing to crab shell and lanterns for party rave lights idk


### Another One Bites The Dust


![Crafting Recipe 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6093d172885c201c642139d47f161d16593b3d5.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** gunpouder looks like dust 

### Dont Stop Me Now


![Crafting Recipe 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59f73041650d0106e99aa6847cc6f89a633afd7e.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** red banner for stop sign

### Analog Sunrise


![Crafting Recipe 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b46547bcfca91753d243bdaefacff579abee62f7.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** analog reminded me of comparators cus of range of values

### Bone Theme


![Crafting Recipe 7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/964dd0acbaee43e730013c17db8ee5d96a1408e0.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** Bones

### Keygen


![Crafting Recipe 8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e66ffdb4d1769c7b8801c5291354cb0ca1d7a21.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** chains looked like keys although i could have used trial keys i didnt really want to

### Beat It


![Crafting Recipe 9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab631c2813f4692992f9adca7e050139e4a9a9a9.png)

**Reason For Recipe:** idk what i was thinking, leave it to your imagination

### Lava Chicken


![Crafting Recipe 10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8511f51fc37efe63e905c316d423066625c715df.png)

Reason For Recipe: LAVA CHICKEN

**Reason For Diamond And Amethyst:** I wanted the disc to be hard to get and amethyst kinda reminded me of a cd material

**Reason For Redstone In Bonelab And Boneworks Discs:** redstone because of its virtual accociation

**Reason For Gold In Queen Songs:** gold in a crown for queen


## **Suggestions**

**You can make suggestions to me for recipe changes and new music discs but arent garaunteed**
**For recipe changes keep diamond in middle and amethyst atleast on middle sides**

## **Important**
**I did not make the music,i only edited them and made the mod**
